title: sumbaino #4819
definition:
1) to walk with the feet near together
 2) to come together, meet with one
 3) of things which fall out at the same time, to happen, turn out,
    come to pass
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to walk with the feet near together
 2) to come together, meet with one
 3) of things which fall out at the same time, to happen, turn out,
    come to pass

    NASB:  to come together, i.e. (of events) to come to pass:
